name: Particle Size Distribution Characterization
description: Perform a particle size distribution analysis on the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image. Segment the particles, filtering out noise smaller than 10 px^2 and excluding edge particles. Calculate the Area, Perimeter, and Equivalent Circular Diameter (d = 2 * sqrt(Area / pi)) for each particle. Generate a CSV report at ~/ImageJ_Data/results/size_distribution.csv containing the individual particle data, summary statistics (Count, Mean, Median, Standard Deviation, Coefficient of Variation, Min, and Max of the diameters), and size bin distributions for Small (d < 20), Medium (20 <= d <= 35), and Large (d > 35).
